message:
lint(widgets): add #[must_use] to Panel builder methods (bd-2yqly)

Add #[must_use] annotations to 10 Panel builder methods (borders,
border_style, border_type, title, title_alignment, title_style,
subtitle, subtitle_alignment, subtitle_style, style, padding) to
prevent accidental discard of builder chain results.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
